title: Jared Black
text:
I'm Jared Black, an assistant professor of health economics in the Army–Baylor Graduate Program (MHA/MBA).

    research
    My approach is empirical, built on econometrics, statistics, and data science.
    I study health economics and public policy in healthcare systems — from psychedelic decriminalization to the financial effects of hospital data breaches.
    A few current projects:
    
    
      Psychedelic Decriminalization Effects on Emergency Care
      Inpatient Outcomes After Psychedelic Decriminalization
      More Ado about Nothing? The Financial Effects of Hospital Data Breaches
      ElectionGPT
      “Ask an Economist” GPT
    
    

    more
    Feel free to explore, or get in touch.
